heading: CyCounterclaim for an order other than a sum of money
infoParagraph1: CyYou will be able to upload any evidence you have on the next page.
infoParagraph2: CyThe claimant will be able to see your answers.
characterCountHint: CyFor example, 'for the landlord to conduct remedial works'
